title: AB Pet Mattress, 20 x 10 x 6 Inches, Lightweight Portable Pet Bed Mat for Small Dogs and Cats
bullets: Perfect size for small pets: 20 x 10 x 6 inches (LxWxH), ideal for small dogs, cats, and puppies
Lightweight at only 0.99 lb, easy to carry from room to room or take on trips
Compact design fits most standard crates, carriers, and kennels, providing a cozy resting spot
Versatile use: place on the floor, in a pet bed frame, or on your bedroom furniture to give your pet a designated space
Durable construction from AB, a trusted brand, ensures long-lasting comfort for your furry friend
description: Give your small pet a comfortable place to relax with the AB Pet Mattress. This compact bed mat measures 20 x 10 x 6 inches, making it just right for small dogs, cats, puppies, and other small animals. Weighing only 0.99 lb, it's lightweight and portable, so you can easily move it around the house or take it with you when traveling. The versatile design fits into crates, carriers, or can be used as a standalone bed. Crafted with attention to quality, it provides a dedicated resting spot that helps keep your pet cozy and secure. Easy to maintain and built to last, the AB Pet Mattress is a great addition to your pet care essentials.
searchTerms: pet mattress small dog bed cat mat crate pad sleeping lightweight ab 20x10 puppy animal portable indoor comfortable product
